functions.title: Guide Book #70
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #70§r
§lGlow Bird§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Small bird, Animal, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: Crystal Cave, Mosshroom Cave, Mushroom Cave.
•§lHealth§r: 16 §o(Wild)§r |

22 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.23
•§lFly speed§r: 0.35
•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Any type of Seeds, Berries, Berry Cookies.
•§lHealed by§r: Any type of Seeds, Berries, Berry Cookies.

•§lBreeds with§r: Any type of Seeds, Berries.
•§lEgg laying§r: 1-3 Glow Bird Eggs §o(Wild)§r | 2-4 Glow Bird Eggs §o(Tamed)§r
•§lAging by§r: Any type of Seeds, Berries, Berry Cookies.
•§lTamed by§r: Berry Cookies.

•§lPossible drops§r: Blue Feather, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Wild)§r: Players, Deopard, Fox, Ocelot, Monsters.
•Wild Glow Bird can randomly sit.
•Tamed Glow Bird can be sat down.
•Adult Glow Bird can spawn or produce a §lBlue Feather§r

every 10 to 15 minutes when wild or every 5 to 10 minutes when tamed.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Glow Bird can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Glow Bird is a charming and gentle cave-dwelling avian creature, found fluttering through the crystal-lit and fungal depths of Minecraft's underground biomes. Known for its soft, radiant glow and peaceful nature, this small

§‘bird not only avoids predators but can be tamed with sweet treats like Berry Cookies. Once tamed, it becomes a loyal companion, laying more Glow Bird Eggs and producing shimmering Blue Feathers over time. Its ability to fly, sit, and self-heal when
resting makes it a delightful and soothing presence in any underground base.§’
